name: Oktoberfest
summary:
EARLY ACCESS

Dive into the ultimate VR fun fair game, bringing the excitement and social buzz of the original Munich Oktoberfest right to your home. Be among the first to explore this virtual wonderland!

Key Features:
🎯 Fairground Games: Engage in gun shooting, ball throwing, and catapult games.
🎢 Virtual Motion Rides: Experience thrilling rides with realistic motion effects.
👕 Avatar Customization: Personalize your look with traditional Bavarian outfits and accessories.
🛠️ Physics-Based...
